## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / scaffolding
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO)
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] If this changes default-mode output, I've included before/after token + recall evidence

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know. Token measurements use `cl100k_base` (tiktoken).
